ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or abstract of the document */,
  "takeaways" TEXT /* Key takeaways or findings from the document */,
  "link" TEXT /* URL link to the full text of the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID to which the document belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the document was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the document has received */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of times the document has been cited */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) to uniquely identify the document */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was published */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher or organization that published the document */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the document is written */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of keywords for search and filtering */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is open access */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the document file (e.g., PDF, DOCX, HTML) */,
  "related_documents" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of related document IDs */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document, useful for tracking revisions */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the document is published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category, to support hierarchical categorization */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active and visible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user (city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "citing_doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document that cites another document */,
  "cited_doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being cited */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Text of the citation */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword itself */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document associated with the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a document */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bookmark */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being bookmarked */,
  "bookmark_date" TEXT /* Date when the bookmark was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bookmarks_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
